title: Social Media Handler
description:
This is a full-time, on-site Social Media Handler role based in Lahore District.
The social media Handler will be responsible for creating, curating, and managing content for all social media platforms, ensuring brand consistency across channels. Daily tasks include scheduling posts, monitoring analytics, managing online communities, and engaging with audiences to increase reach and grow the brand’s digital presence. This role requires staying updated with industry trends, running social media campaigns, and collaborating with other departments for cohesive branding.
requirements: Minimum of a Bachelors degree (14 years).
Marketing, Media, or Communication Studies.
At least 2 years of experience in social media management or a related field.
Candidates must be between 22 and 40 years old.
Proven ability to create, curate, and manage content across all social media platforms.
Proficiency in scheduling posts and monitoring social media analytics.
Experience in managing online communities and engaging with audiences to grow brand reach.
Ability to stay updated with current digital trends and run effective social media campaigns.
Skill in collaborating with other departments to ensure cohesive and consistent branding.
Must be available for a full-time, on-site morning shift in Lahore.

title: Graphic Designer Intern
description:
We are looking for a creative and motivated Graphic Designer Intern to join our team. This internship is ideal for fresh graduates who have basic knowledge of graphic design and want to gain real-world experience.

Key Responsibilities:

Assist in creating visual content for social media, websites, and marketing materials.

Help design banners, flyers, posters, and other promotional materials.

Support the senior design team in daily tasks and projects.

Learn and apply design principles, color schemes, and typography.

Contribute ideas for creative campaigns and design improvements.
requirements: Fresh graduate in Graphic Design, Visual Arts, or a related field.
Basic knowledge of design software like Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva.
Creative mindset with attention to detail.
Good communication and willingness to learn.
Ability to meet deadlines and work in a team.

title: HR Manager
description:
We are looking for a motivated and experienced Human Resources (HR) professional to join our growing team.

Position: Human Resources (HR)
Shift: Evening Shift
Education Requirement: Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (Graduation) required

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage recruitment and onboarding processes
• Maintain employee records and HR documentation
• Support staff with HR policies and workplace concerns
• Assist with payroll coordination and compliance
• Ensure company policies and procedures are followed

Requirements:
• Previous experience in Human Resources or a related role
• Strong communication and organizational skills
• Ability to handle confidential information professionally
• Experience in healthcare administration is a plus

Location: Kohinoor Faisalabad
requirements: Previous experience in Human Resources or a related role
Strong communication and organizational skills
Ability to handle confidential information professionally
Experience in healthcare administration is a plus

title: Accountant / Accounts Executive - Construction Company
description:
Earth Builders is a leading construction company based in Rawalpindi, specializing in transforming innovative designs into economical living spaces. With a commitment to high standards, we strive to meet our clients' dreams within their budgets. Join our dynamic team and contribute to our ambitious projects spanning hospitality, leisure, and commercial sectors.

Responsibilities:
- Manage day-to-day financial transactions and recordkeeping.
- Prepare and analyze financial statements and reports.
- Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting.
- Ensure compliance with financial regulations and standards.
- Collaborate with project managers to track project budgets and costs.
- Provide support during audits and assist with financial planning.
requirements: Proficiency in accounting software and MS Excel.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities.
Ability to work independently and in a team environment.
Strong communication skills, both verbal and written.
Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
1-year experience in accounting or finance, preferably in the construction industry.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Milkiyat.com, visit our site for more details. https://milkiyat.com/jobs. A premier name in the real estate sector of Islamabad, Pakistan, is seeking a talented Graphic Designer to join our dynamic team remotely. Established with a vision to redefine property transactions, we leverage technology to simplify the real estate experience. We are looking for a creative individual with at least 1 year of experience to help enhance our visual branding and marketing efforts in the real estate industry.

Responsibilities:
- Design engaging graphics for our website, social media, and marketing materials.
- Collaborate with the marketing team to create cohesive and effective branding.
- Develop concepts and layouts for promotional materials and advertisements.
- Ensure all visual content aligns with our brand identity.
- Edit images and illustrations to maintain high quality.
- Stay updated on design trends and best practices in the real estate sector.
requirements: Proficiency in graphic design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite).
Strong portfolio showcasing previous design work.
Good understanding of typography, color theory, and layout design.
Excellent attention to detail and creativity.
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design or related field
Relevant experience may be considered

title: Real Estate Consultant / Team Lead / Manager - Investment Advisor
description:
Imarat Downtown is seeking dynamic, ambitious, and results-driven professionals for the positions of Senior Investment Consultant, Team Lead, and Manager. The ideal candidates will play a key role in expanding market presence by providing professional real estate investment advisory services to high-net-worth individuals, corporate clients, and investors.

The selected candidates will be responsible for generating new business opportunities, managing client relationships, and delivering tailored investment solutions aligned with clients’ investment goals. This role requires strong communication, negotiation, and closing skills, along with the ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.

Candidates with experience in real estate, corporate sales, business development, or investment advisory will be preferred. High-performing individuals will be provided career growth opportunities, including progression into Team Lead and Manager roles.

Develop and execute strategic business development initiatives to expand market presence and drive investment growth
Provide professional real estate investment advisory services to high-net-worth individuals, corporate clients, and investors
Identify and capitalize on new investment opportunities within commercial and residential real estate markets
Build, manage, and grow a portfolio of clients through relationship-driven sales strategies
Conduct professional investment presentations and consultations tailored to client objectives
Achieve and exceed individual and team sales targets through strategic planning and execution
Collaborate with internal teams to align sales strategies with marketing initiatives and business goals
Maintain in-depth knowledge of real estate market trends, competitor activities, and investment opportunities
Negotiate and structure investment deals while ensuring client satisfaction and long-term partnerships
Prepare performance reports, forecasts, and pipeline updates for management review
Support leadership initiatives and contribute to overall business growth strategy
Guide and mentor junior consultants and support team development (for Team Lead / Manager roles)
Represent Imarat Downtown with professionalism in client meetings, corporate engagements, and networking events
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree (Business, Marketing, Management, or related field preferred)
Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (Business, Marketing, Management, or related field preferred)
Minimum 2–5 years of experience in Real Estate, Sales, or Business Development
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Target-driven and self-motivated personality
Professional appearance and client handling skills
Experience in corporate sales or real estate preferred
Ability to handle high-net-worth individuals and corporate clients
Strong relationship-building and closing skills
Leadership potential preferred for Team Lead and Manager roles

title: Business Growth Executive
description:
In this role, the Business Growth Executive will be responsible for driving business opportunities in the Saudi market through proactive outreach and structured sales activities. The candidate will focus on lead generation, client communication, and maintaining a strong sales pipeline.

The role involves actively identifying potential clients, initiating contact through calls and other channels, and scheduling meetings to present company offerings. The candidate will ensure timely follow-ups with prospects to nurture relationships and move opportunities forward in the sales funnel.

A key responsibility includes generating and qualifying leads through telemarketing, networking, and market research, while maintaining accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM system. The candidate will track all interactions, manage prospects efficiently, and ensure proper documentation of the sales pipeline.

Strong communication and coordination skills are essential to engage clients, understand their requirements, and align solutions accordingly. The candidate will also collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution and closure of opportunities.

Additionally, the role requires continuous market research to understand industry trends, competitor activities, and potential areas of expansion within the Saudi region. Regular reporting on lead status, follow-ups, and sales activities will be expected to support management in decision-making.
requirements: Graduate
Arabic Language Proficiency (preferred for Saudi region)
Lead Generation & Qualification
Telemarketing & Cold Calling
Strong Verbal & Written Communication
Negotiation & Persuasion Skills
Customer Handling & Relationship Building
Reporting & Documentation

title: Sales Executive (Pharma / Nutraceutical Experience) - Field-Based
description:
We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Executive to expand our footprint in the twin cities. If you have a background in pharmaceutical or nutraceutical sales and a passion for science-backed skincare, we want you on our team. You will be responsible for driving B2B sales, managing retail relationships, and educating healthcare professionals/pharmacists on our product range.

A base salary of PKR 40,000 will be offered to the selected candiadte. With performance based incentives the take home salary could be upto PKR 100,000/-

Market Expansion: Identify and onboard new retail outlets, pharmacies, and skin clinics in Islamabad and Rawalpindi.

Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong rapport with pharmacists, dermatologists, and store managers.

Product Education: Effectively communicate the benefits of our skincare and wellness products (including our specialized night creams and supplements).

Sales Targets: Meet and exceed monthly sales KPIs and collection targets.

Market Intelligence: Provide regular feedback on competitor activity and market trends.

Experience: 2–3 years of proven sales experience specifically in the Pharmaceutical or Nutraceutical sector.

Perks & Benefits: Incentive Bonus and Transport
requirements: Bachelor’s degree (Science or Marketing background preferred).

title: Manager - Risk Strategy and Oversight, Enterprise Risk Management
description: The Manager will oversee risk governance activities, including managing risk committees, maintaining the enterprise-wide risk register, and developing key risk indicators to monitor and escalate risks appropriately. This position also involves preparing comprehensive risk reports and presentations for senior management and the Board Audit Committee. The Manager leads initiatives in digital transformation to enhance risk function capabilities through technology, drives pilot control testing programs in partnership with internal audit, and promotes continuous learning and development in ERM across the company. Effective leadership and mentorship of the risk team ensure a collaborative environment focused on excellence and strategic risk management.
requirements: Risk Assessment and Mitigation
Enterprise Risk Management Frameworks
Stackholder Engaement
Quantitative Risk Assessment (QRA)
Project Management

title: Assistant Professor – Computer Science
description:
The University of the Punjab, one of Pakistan's oldest and most prestigious universities, invites applications for the position of Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science, Lahore.

The successful candidate will be responsible for teaching undergraduate and postgraduate courses, supervising student research projects, and contributing to departmental research activities.
requirements: PhD in Computer Science or related field (or near completion)
Strong research publications record
Experience in teaching at university level
Expertise in AI, Machine Learning, or Software Engineering preferred
Excellent communication and presentation skills

title: Civil Engineer – Road Construction
description:
The National Highway Authority is seeking qualified Civil Engineers to join its Road Construction and Maintenance division. Selected engineers will work on major highway projects across Pakistan including the CPEC corridor.

This is an excellent opportunity to work on large-scale national infrastructure projects with a government organization offering job security and competitive benefits.
requirements: BE/BSc Civil Engineering from HEC recognized university
PEC registration (mandatory)
2+ years of road/highway construction experience
Knowledge of AutoCAD and project management tools
Willingness to travel and work on field sites
Strong understanding of AASHTO standards

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Daraz, Pakistan's leading e-commerce platform and part of Alibaba Group, is looking for a Digital Marketing Manager to lead performance marketing campaigns across social media, search, and display channels.

You will manage a team of 5 marketing specialists, oversee a multi-million PKR advertising budget, and be responsible for user acquisition and retention strategies.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or related field
4+ years of digital marketing experience
Proven expertise in Meta Ads and Google Ads
Strong analytical skills with Google Analytics
Experience managing a marketing team
E-commerce background is a plus

title: Journalist / Content Writer
description:
Dawn Media Group, Pakistan's most trusted English language media organization, is looking for talented journalists and content writers for its digital news desk in Karachi.

You will be responsible for writing news articles, features, and analysis pieces for Dawn.com and the Dawn newspaper covering national, political, and business topics.
requirements: Bachelor's in Journalism, Mass Communication, or English Literature
2+ years of journalism or content writing experience
Excellent English writing and editing skills
Ability to work under tight deadlines
Strong knowledge of current affairs in Pakistan
Experience with CMS platforms

title: Second Lieutenant – Regular Commission
description:
The Pakistan Army invites applications from unmarried Pakistani male and female graduates for Regular Commission as Second Lieutenant. This is one of the most prestigious career paths in Pakistan offering leadership, training, and lifelong service to the nation.

Selected candidates will join the Pakistan Military Academy (PMA) Kakul for 2 years of rigorous officer training before being commissioned.
requirements: Bachelor's degree (minimum 14 years education)
Pakistani national
Age between 17–22 years at time of commission
Physically and medically fit
Must pass ISSB tests (psychological, physical, intelligence)
Unmarried at time of joining

title: Full Stack Developer (Remote)
description:
Arbisoft, one of Pakistan's top software houses with US and European clients, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for a remote-first position. You will work directly with an international client building a SaaS product used by thousands of businesses globally.

Arbisoft is an award-winning company recognized in the Inc. 5000 list with offices in Lahore and San Francisco. You will work Pakistan hours with flexibility.
requirements: 3+ years of full-stack development experience
Strong proficiency in React.js and Node.js
Experience with PostgreSQL or MongoDB
Familiarity with AWS or cloud infrastructure
Excellent written English communication
Ability to work independently in a remote environment

title: Branch Manager
description:
Habib Bank Limited, Pakistan's largest bank, is seeking experienced Branch Managers for multiple locations across Pakistan. The Branch Manager will be responsible for overall branch operations, sales targets, customer service, and compliance.

HBL offers a competitive salary package, medical benefits, and a clear career progression path within one of Pakistan's most reputable financial institutions.
requirements: MBA Finance or BBA (16 years education)
5+ years of banking experience
Previous branch management or team lead experience
Strong knowledge of SBP regulations
Excellent leadership and interpersonal skills
Proficient in banking software (T24 preferred)

title: Medical Officer (MBBS)
description:
Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (PIMS), Islamabad is inviting applications for the post of Medical Officer in various departments including General Medicine, Surgery, Paediatrics, and Emergency.

This is a contract-based position with the possibility of regularization. PIMS is one of Pakistan's largest public sector hospitals providing world-class medical facilities.
requirements: MBBS from a recognized Pakistani or foreign university
Valid PMDC registration
House job completion certificate
Pakistani national
Age not exceeding 35 years
Good standing with no disciplinary action

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Engro Corporation, one of Pakistan's largest conglomerates, is looking for a Senior Accountant to join its finance team at the head office in Karachi. The role involves managing financial reporting, tax compliance, and internal audit coordination.

Engro offers an excellent work culture, competitive salary, and comprehensive benefits package including medical, gratuity, and provident fund.
requirements: ACCA, CA (finalist or qualified), or MBA Finance
4+ years of accounting experience in a reputable firm
Strong knowledge of IFRS and local tax laws
Proficiency in SAP (mandatory)
Experience with FBR tax filing and WHT
Excellent MS Excel skills

title: HR Business Partner
description:
Unilever Pakistan, a subsidiary of the global FMCG giant, is hiring an HR Business Partner to support its Supply Chain and Manufacturing division based in Rahim Yar Khan.

You will act as a strategic HR partner to business leaders, driving talent management, employee engagement, and organizational development initiatives.
requirements: MBA Human Resources or Business Administration
4+ years of HR generalist experience
Experience in manufacturing or FMCG sector preferred
Strong knowledge of Pakistan Labor Law
Excellent interpersonal and coaching skills
SAP HR module experience is a plus

title: Project Manager – Construction
description:
Bahria Town, Pakistan's largest private real estate developer, is hiring an experienced Project Manager for its mega construction projects in Lahore. You will oversee the complete lifecycle of residential and commercial building projects from planning to handover.

This is a high-visibility role offering excellent career growth within one of Pakistan's most dynamic real estate organizations.
requirements: BE Civil Engineering with PMP certification preferred
7+ years of construction project management
Experience managing projects above PKR 500M
Strong knowledge of Primavera P6 or MS Project
Excellent contractor and vendor management skills
Experience with high-rise residential buildings

title: Part-time Graphic Designer (Remote)
description:
Rozee.pk, Pakistan's leading online job portal, is looking for a part-time Graphic Designer to support its marketing team on a remote basis. You will create social media posts, email templates, banner ads, and UI design assets.

This is an ideal opportunity for students or freelancers looking for flexible remote work with one of Pakistan's top tech companies.
requirements: Strong portfolio of graphic design work
Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
Understanding of social media design best practices
Ability to meet deadlines
Students in final year are welcome to apply

title: Primary School Teacher
description:
Beaconhouse School System, Pakistan's largest private school network with over 330,000 students, is hiring Primary School Teachers for its campuses in Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad.

You will be responsible for teaching Cambridge curriculum to students from Grade 1-5, preparing lesson plans, conducting assessments, and communicating with parents.
requirements: Bachelor's degree (B.Ed preferred)
1+ years of primary school teaching experience
Familiarity with Cambridge O/A Level curriculum
Strong classroom management skills
Patient and nurturing personality
Proficiency in English

title: Software Engineer – Flutter
description:
Systems Limited is looking for a skilled Flutter developer to join our mobile development team in Lahore. You will be responsible for building cross-platform mobile and web applications for our enterprise clients.

You will work in an agile environment, collaborating with designers and backend engineers to deliver high-quality products. Systems Limited is one of Pakistan's largest IT companies with over 10,000 employees and global clients.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
2+ years of Flutter/Dart development experience
Experience with REST APIs and Firebase
Knowledge of state management (BLoC or Provider)
Strong problem-solving skills
Good communication in English

title: Income Tax Officer BS-17 – FBR
description:
The Federal Board of Revenue invites applications from Pakistani nationals for the post of Income Tax Officer (BS-17) under the Inland Revenue Service. This is a prestigious government position offering full civil service benefits, pension, and job security.

Selected candidates will be placed in various regional tax offices across Pakistan after completion of training at the National Tax Academy, Islamabad.
requirements: Minimum 16 years of education (Bachelor's or equivalent)
Pakistani national with valid CNIC
Age between 21–30 years
Must pass FPSC written test and interview
Good moral character and no criminal record
Medical fitness certificate from government hospital

title: Sub-Inspector – Punjab Police
description:
Punjab Police invites applications from eligible Pakistani nationals for the post of Sub-Inspector (BS-14) through the Punjab Public Service Commission. This is a prestigious law enforcement position offering government job security, pension, and allowances.

Selected candidates will undergo 6 months of training at the Police Training College before being posted.
requirements: Minimum graduation (14 years education)
Pakistani national domiciled in Punjab
Age between 20–25 years
Height minimum 5'7" for male, 5'4" for female
Physically fit with no criminal record
Pass written test conducted by PPSC

title: Legal Counsel – Corporate
description:
Jazz, Pakistan's largest telecom company with over 70 million subscribers, is looking for an experienced Legal Counsel to join its Corporate Affairs team in Islamabad.

You will provide legal advice on corporate transactions, regulatory compliance, contract drafting, and dispute resolution. You will work closely with senior management and external law firms.
requirements: LLB or LLM from a recognized university
Enrolled with Pakistan Bar Council
5+ years of corporate legal experience
Experience in telecom or tech sector preferred
Strong drafting and negotiation skills
Fluent in English and Urdu

title: Programme Officer
description:
UNHCR Pakistan, the United Nations Refugee Agency, is seeking a qualified Programme Officer to support its protection and assistance programs for Afghan refugees in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

This is a nationally recruited position offering UN salary scale, health insurance, and the opportunity to make a meaningful humanitarian impact.
requirements: Master's degree in Social Sciences, Development Studies, or related field
4+ years of NGO or UN programme experience
Experience working with refugees or displaced persons
Strong report writing and data analysis skills
Fluent in English, Urdu, and Pashto preferred
Willingness to travel to field sites

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
TPL Insurance, one of Pakistan's fastest-growing non-life insurance companies, is looking for enthusiastic Customer Service Representatives to join its customer support team in Karachi.

You will handle inbound calls, resolve policy queries, process claims, and ensure a positive customer experience. Fresh graduates with good communication skills are encouraged to apply.
requirements: Minimum intermediate or graduation
Excellent verbal communication in Urdu and English
Proficiency in MS Office
Ability to work in shifts
Customer-focused attitude
Previous call center experience is a plus

title: Network Engineer
description:
PTCL, Pakistan's national telecommunications company, is recruiting Network Engineers for its Core Network Operations team. You will be responsible for managing, monitoring, and optimizing PTCL's nationwide fiber and broadband infrastructure.

PTCL offers a government-linked job with excellent benefits including pension, housing allowance, and medical coverage.
requirements: BE Telecommunication or Electrical Engineering
CCNA certification (mandatory), CCNP preferred
2+ years of network operations experience
Knowledge of BGP, OSPF, MPLS
Experience with Cisco and Huawei equipment
Willingness to work in 24/7 shift environment
